untranslatable_reason: The signal requires linear regression analysis with custom channel projection (Y = a×X + b ± BU/BL), which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. The Bollinger Bands proxy approximates the channel concept but does not implement the exact regression-based methodology described in the original signal.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using Bollinger Bands (bb_upper, bb_lower, bb_middle) as a proxy for the projected regression channels. True implementation requires: (1) linear regression slope (a) and intercept (b) calculations, (2) upper/lower band distances (BU, BL) computed from regression residuals, and (3) one-period-ahead channel projection. The allowed indicator set lacks regression-specific functions needed for exact translation.
